name: Liver-Sage Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Veal or pork stew meat - cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the veal or pork and chicken livers with the sage, garlic, capers, pepper, and white wine. Cover and place in the refrigerator for 4 hours, or up to 12 hours.
2. Remove the mixture from the refrigerator and add the bacon. Pass the mixture through a meat grinder fitted with medium holes or pulse in a food processor until well combined but not quite smooth.
3. Stuff the mixture into sausage casings, forming one long sausage or patties.
4. To cook, place the sausages on a hot grill or under a preheated broiler. Grill 5 to 6 minutes on each side.
